title: ERNET India – Assistant, Junior Scientific Officer and More – 5 Posts
shortInfo: Education and Research Network of India (ERNET India) has released a recruitment notification for 5 Assistant, Junior Scientific Officer and More posts for Graduate/B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc./Diploma candidates, and candidates can apply offline from 11-05-2026 to 09-06-2026 at ERNET India.

basic_details.job_title: ERNET India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline For Assistant, Junior Scientific Officer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Education and Research Network of India (ERNET India) has released a recruitment notification for 5 Assistant, Junior Scientific Officer and More posts for Graduate/B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc./Diploma candidates, and candidates can apply offline from 11-05-2026 to 09-06-2026 at ERNET India.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, B.E./B.Tech, M.Sc., Diploma in Engineering, B.Sc.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: Education and Research Network of India Senior Manager (Group A)
